revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Oshima | title = [[Oshima Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list1 = *[[Hakodate]]
| group2 = [[List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list2 = *[[Hokuto, Hokkaido|Hokuto]]
| group3 = Districts | list3 = *[[Futami District, Hokkaido|Futami District]] **[[Yakumo, Hokkaido|Yakumo]] *[[Kameda District, Hokkaido|Kameda District]] **[[Nanae, Hokkaido|Nanae]] *[[Kamiiso District, Hokkaido|Kamiiso District]] **[[Kikonai, Hokkaido|Kikonai]] **[[Shiriuchi, Hokkaido|Shiriuchi]] *[[Kayabe District, Hokkaido|Kayabe District]] **[[Mori, Hokkaido|Mori]] **[[Shikabe, Hokkaido|Shikabe]] *[[Matsumae District, Hokkaido|Matsumae District]] **[[Fukushima, Hokkaido|Fukushima]] **[[Matsumae, Hokkaido|Matsumae]] *[[Yamakoshi District, Hokkaido|Yamakoshi District]] **[[Oshamambe, Hokkaido|Oshamambe]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the subprefectures of Hokkaido

| group3 = Districts | list3 = *[[:en:Futami District, Hokkaido|Futami District]] **[[Yakumo, Hokkaido|Yakumo]] *[[:en:Kameda District, Hokkaido|Kameda District]] **[[:en:Nanae, Hokkaido|Nanae]] *[[:en:Kamiiso District, Hokkaido|Kamiiso District]] **[[:en:Kikonai, Hokkaido|Kikonai]] **[[Shiriuchi, Hokkaido|Shiriuchi]] *[[:en:Kayabe District, Hokkaido|Kayabe District]] **[[:en:Mori, Hokkaido|Mori]] **[[Shikabe, Hokkaido|Shikabe]] *[[:en:Matsumae District, Hokkaido|Matsumae District]] **[[:en:Fukushima, Hokkaido|Fukushima]] **[[:en:Matsumae, Hokkaido|Matsumae]] *[[Yamakoshi District, Hokkaido|Yamakoshi District]] **[[:en:Oshamambe, Hokkaido|Oshamambe]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
